name: Goblin Hearth
description: Rows of old stone bunks have been patched together with blankets, woven reeds, and scavenged timber.
A cooking fire crackles cheerfully in the center of the room while several goblins prepare a meal,
their children darting between piles of supplies. The scent of roasted mushrooms fills the air.
These are not raiders preparing for battle. These are families making a home.TODO: AI Text
